enonce.texte:
📝 Exercise 1: Match the jobs with their descriptions.

JobDescription
1. TeacherA. Helps sick people.
2. DoctorB. Teaches students at school.
3. FarmerC. Grows crops and raises animals.
4. NurseD. Cares for patients in a hospital.
5. DriverE. Drives vehicles like cars and buses.

questions.texte: Match each job with its description.

enonce.texte: 📝 Exercise 2: Complete the sentences with the correct verb: like, love, hate, don't like.

questions.texte: I ___________ being a teacher because I enjoy helping children learn.
She ___________ being a nurse because she doesn't like seeing sick people.
My father ___________ working on the farm. He loves nature.
They ___________ being drivers because the roads are very bad.
I ___________ playing football. It is my favourite sport.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 3: Describe your dream job in 3-4 sentences.

Instructions:

  • Mention the name of the job.
  • Say why you like it.
  • Say what tools or things you use.
  • Describe the uniform if there is one.

questions.texte: Write 3-4 sentences about your dream job.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

My dream job is to be a doctor. I like it because I want to help sick people. I will use a stethoscope and a thermometer. I will wear a white coat and a mask.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 4: Read the description and answer the questions.

My name is Paul. I am a farmer. I work on a farm. I grow vegetables like tomatoes and onions. I also raise chickens and goats. I love my job because I enjoy working outside in the fresh air. I wake up very early every morning to feed the animals. I wear old clothes and boots because the work is dirty. I use tools like a hoe and a watering can. I don't like sitting inside all day. Being a farmer makes me happy and healthy.

questions.texte: Why does Paul love his job?
questions.reponse: He loves his job because he enjoys working outside in the fresh air.
He uses a hoe and a watering can.

questions.texte: What does Paul wear for his job?
questions.reponse: He wears old clothes and boots.
He doesn't like sitting inside all day.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 5: Write a short paragraph about a job you know well.

Instructions:

  • Describe the job (name, tasks, tools, uniform).
  • Say what you like or don't like about it.
  • Write 5-6 sentences.

questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

A teacher is a very important job. A teacher teaches students at school. He or she uses books, a board, and a pen. Teachers wear clean and smart clothes. I like being a teacher because I like helping children learn. I don't like when students are noisy. Being a teacher is a noble profession.

enonce.texte: 💬 Exercise 6: Answer the questions about jobs.

questions.texte: Do you like being a student? Why or why not?
questions.reponse: Yes, I like being a student because I like learning new things. / No, I don't like being a student because I find school difficult.

questions.texte: What job do you like? Why?
questions.reponse: I like being a doctor because I want to help sick people.

questions.texte: What job don't you like? Why?
questions.reponse: I don't like being a driver because the roads are bad and it's dangerous.

questions.texte: What is your father's job? Do you like it?
questions.reponse: My father is a teacher. I like it because he helps children learn.

enonce.texte:
🔧 Exercise 7: Match the tools and uniform with the correct job.

Tools/UniformJob
1. Stethoscope, white coatA. Farmer
2. Hoe, watering canB. Teacher
3. Book, board, penC. Nurse
4. Uniform, syringeD. Doctor

questions.texte: Match each set of tools/uniform with the correct job.

enonce.texte:
🎯 Exercise 8: Write a short paragraph about the job you want to do in the future.

Instructions:

  • Say the name of the job.
  • Explain why you want to do it.
  • Say what tools you will use.
  • Say what uniform you will wear.

questions.texte: Write 5-6 sentences about the job you want in the future.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

In the future, I want to be a nurse. I like this job because I want to help sick people. I will use a thermometer and a syringe. I will wear a white uniform and a cap. I will work in a hospital. I think being a nurse is a good job.
